ddls:
CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of the venue (e.g., Beer Bar, Brewpub) */,
  "google_score" REAL /* Google Score for the venue */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance from a reference point (e.g., user's location) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate for precise mapping */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate for precise mapping */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the venue */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the venue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the venue */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the venue_types table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES venue_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., patron, venue admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user for the venue */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment made by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "ambiance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the venue's ambiance */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the service quality */,
  "beer_selection_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the beer selection */,
  "food_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the food quality */,
  "price_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the price satisfaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue for which metrics are tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric record */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the venue on that date */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews submitted for the venue on that date */,
  "ambiance_average" REAL /* Average ambiance rating */,
  "service_average" REAL /* Average service rating */,
  "beer_selection_average" REAL /* Average beer selection rating */,
  "food_average" REAL /* Average food rating */,
  "price_average" REAL /* Average price satisfaction rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_metrics_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue being recommended */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., similar preferences) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue managed by the admin */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the admin */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., manager, owner) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the admin account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the admin account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_admins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venue_admins_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue type (e.g., Beer Bar, Brewpub) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the venue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
